# Pull Request

## Description

<!-- Clearly describe what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature or section
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `content` — copy, images, or portfolio updates
- [ ] `style` — CSS / design changes only
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD or workflow changes
- [ ] `chore` — dependencies, config, tooling
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors or warnings
- [ ] No TypeScript / Astro type errors (`npx astro check`)
- [ ] No unused imports or dead code introduced

### Visual / Content
- [ ] Tested on desktop (≥ 1280px)
- [ ] Tested on tablet (768px – 1024px)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (≤ 480px)
- [ ] All images have descriptive `alt` text
- [ ] Images are in `src/assets/images/` (not `public/`)
- [ ] New images use kebab-case filenames

### Git & Versioning
- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `hotfix/*`, `release/*`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the conventional format (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
- [ ] Version bumped in `package.json` if applicable
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if applicable

### SEO & Accessibility
- [ ] New sections have proper heading hierarchy (`h1` → `h2` → `h3`)
- [ ] No colour-contrast issues introduced
- [ ] Page title / meta description unchanged or intentionally updated

Closes #
